⚠️ Risk Levels
CRITICAL API keys, private keys, SSNs — always warned
HIGH Passports, IBANs, tokens — warned with context
MEDIUM IP addresses, phone numbers, addresses
LOW Keywords — warned only with other signals
All detection runs locally — no data leaves your device.
